characters.name: Papa Kazi
characters.description: Magnificent male lion father with a huge dark brown mane, golden amber eyes, powerful muscular build, proud protective stance
uniqueFeatures: LARGEST character — visibly bigger and more powerful than all others
HUGE DARK BROWN MANE — thick, voluminous, frames his entire face like a crown
GOLDEN AMBER EYES — intense, warm, watchful
POWERFUL MUSCULAR BUILD — broad chest, thick legs, massive paws
PROUD PROTECTIVE STANCE — always standing tall, chest out, head held high
Signature: his mane is so thick and dark it almost looks black at the center
characters.personality: Proud, protective, and regal — stands tall and alert, always watching over his family, but with surprising tenderness
characters.notLike: NOT sleek or slim like Dalila, NOT small like the cubs, the BIGGEST character by far

characters.name: Mama Dalila
characters.description: Sleek golden lioness mother, skilled huntress, athletic muscular build, warm caring eyes, small notch on left ear
uniqueFeatures: SMALLER than Kazi — no mane, sleek and streamlined
ATHLETIC MUSCULAR BUILD — lean and powerful, built for speed
WARM CARING EYES — softer expression than Kazi, but intense when hunting
SMALL NOTCH ON LEFT EAR — her signature mark from a past hunt
SMOOTH GOLDEN FUR — lighter and more uniform than Kazi's coloring
Low hunting stance — often shown crouched and ready to spring
characters.personality: Clever, fast, and nurturing — graceful in movement, fierce when protecting cubs, tender with family
characters.notLike: NOT as large or dark as Kazi, NOT spotted like cubs, always identifiable by ear notch

characters.name: Taji
characters.description: Male lion cub, curious and playful, lighter golden fur with faint spots still visible, big oversized paws he hasn't grown into yet
uniqueFeatures: LIGHTER GOLDEN FUR with FAINT SPOTS — baby rosettes still visible on coat
OVERSIZED PAWS — comically big compared to his body, he trips over them
BIGGER than Zuri — the larger of the two cubs
Later: tiny tufts of mane beginning to grow around neck
GOOFY GRIN — always smiling, one side of mouth higher than the other
Round cub face with oversized ears
characters.personality: Curious, playful, always getting into trouble — pounces on everything, falls over his own paws, eternally cheerful
characters.notLike: NOT as dark as Zuri, NOT as big as parents, identifiable by big paws and lighter color

characters.name: Zuri
characters.description: Female lion cub, brave and bold for her size, slightly smaller than Taji, darker golden fur, always trying to keep up with the adults
uniqueFeatures: DARKER GOLDEN FUR — noticeably darker shade than Taji
SLIGHTLY SMALLER than Taji — the smaller of the two cubs
DETERMINED EXPRESSION — eyebrows set, jaw firm, ready for anything
More ATHLETIC build than Taji even as a cub — takes after Mama
Later: sleek and fast like Dalila, no mane development
Often shown trying to match the adults' stride
characters.personality: Brave, bold, determined — always trying to keep up with the grown-ups, serious about learning to hunt
characters.notLike: NOT as light-colored as Taji, NOT as big as Taji, NOT as large as parents

step3.styleDescription:
Pixar-quality 3D rendering. Smooth, rounded forms with subsurface scattering on skin. Expressive character animation with large soulful eyes. Rich saturated colors. Photorealistic textures but stylized proportions. Professional children's book illustration quality. Cinematic lighting with warm key light and cool fill.

Emphasis on light passing through materials — translucent ears, glowing skin edges, light shining through leaves/water/ice. Subsurface scattering cranked up. Back-lit subjects with ethereal glow.

Rich botanical detail filling the frame — individually rendered leaves, visible bark texture, dewdrops on petals, moss on stones, flowers in full bloom. Nature as living wallpaper.
